brightsmith_agentAttribution.reasoning: Gold zone enrichment of consumable.occupation_profiles with the OEWS wage distribution. Reads 832 rows from base.bls_ooh (Silver) plus 831 rows from base.bls_oews (Silver), runs the existing GRW/wage-percentile/market/confidence/data-completeness derivations on the OOH side, and adds a LEFT JOIN on soc_code to surface the four OEWS percentile columns (wage_p10, wage_p25, wage_p75, wage_p90) onto the same row. Schema evolved from 31 to 35 NestedFields; new IDs 32-35 reserved per spec §Iceberg NestedField IDs. Overwrite mode used to update existing rows because the grain (soc_code) is unchanged but the four new column values must replace the previous nulls. Result: 826 of 832 rows now carry non-null wage_p25 (99.28% coverage); 6 nulls correspond to the 5 fully-suppressed entertainment SOCs plus 1 OOH-only SOC (45-3031 Fishing/Hunting Workers, present in OOH but not in OEWS). All four Gold DQ rules (GLD-OP-OEWS-001 through 004) pass on the live Iceberg table.

documentation.description: Enrich consumable.occupation_profiles with the four OEWS wage-distribution columns (wage_p10/p25/p75/p90) via a LEFT JOIN to base.bls_oews on soc_code. The OOH-side derivations (GRW score, wage percentile rankings, market score, confidence tier, data completeness, static stat/boss mappings) are unchanged. Schema evolved from 31 to 35 NestedFields with new IDs 32-35 per spec. Existing CareerCard 'typical range' (p25-p75) and FinancesCard 'Career salary range' surfaces will read the new columns once the backend dispatch lands.

wage_p10.transformationDescription: Direct carry from base.bls_oews via LEFT JOIN on soc_code. Renamed from wage_annual_p10 to wage_p10 to fit the API/frontend naming convention. NULL when the SOC has no OEWS row (45-3031 OOH-only) or when the OEWS row's p10 was suppressed.

wage_p25.transformationDescription: Direct carry from base.bls_oews via LEFT JOIN on soc_code. Renamed from wage_annual_p25 to wage_p25. Lower bound of the user-facing 'typical range' on CareerCard and FinancesCard.

wage_p75.transformationDescription: Direct carry from base.bls_oews via LEFT JOIN on soc_code. Renamed from wage_annual_p75 to wage_p75. Upper bound of the user-facing 'typical range'.

wage_p90.transformationDescription: Direct carry from base.bls_oews via LEFT JOIN on soc_code. Renamed from wage_annual_p90 to wage_p90. Top-coded at 239200 for 45 high-earning SOCs; consumers must read alongside the OEWS wage_capped flag for correct interpretation.
